title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? NIIT Technologies in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Technologies:
NIIT Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies!
